---
title: "Govern the substrate, leave the ecosystem open"
description: "Governance authority is scoped to the template only; plugins, bundles, and federation are permissionless by design, with the taxonomies serving as shared vocabulary, not control."
date: "2026-07-20"
categories: [research-agents, governance]
draft: true
---

::: {.callout-note title="Status"}
**Policy / position.**
:::

**Thesis.** Governance authority is scoped to the template only; plugins, bundles, and federation are permissionless by design, with the taxonomies serving as shared vocabulary, not control.

**Draws on.** Drawn from the wiki's Ecosystem-Governance.

## Outline

- 
- 
- 

_Stub. Expand from the seed page(s) above._
